data.name: 千金的奴隸家家酒
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


抱持著失落與懊惱，我在極大的低潮下從公司離職了──因為我認為我在這裡一無是處。
但這時候，曾擔任過我主管的劉慧晰，卻拖著行李箱出現在我面前。



「我家那邊現在發生了一些事，不能跟公司的人有所牽扯，你能不能收留我一陣子……？」

她身為我離職的其中一個原因，原本想拒絕她的請求，但礙於先前她百般刁難我的痛苦回憶，我卻無法好好說出我的想法，只好答應讓她暫居在我家一陣子。

沒想到，她卻擅自以「扮演奴隸」作為寄宿的報酬，不但口口聲聲叫喚我「主人」，還時不時就把我的衣服扒掉對我上下其手？！到底怎麼回事？！！



但是，和她相處得越久，我越得知她私底下不同於「主管」身分的另一面，似乎也沒有像以前那樣如此害怕她的存在了，甚至漸漸開始對她產生好奇，以及想了解她堅持住在我家的真正原因……

當我回想起越多記憶，我的心中竟也起了一波波的漣漪……

◆玩法


每日有四個時段，玩家可選擇家中各個房間探索、行動，以及尋找慧晰與她互動。
各項行動隨著劇情發展而開放，以及增加與慧晰互動的次數。
行動後所累積的主角狀態將會影響最後結局，請以提升與慧晰「心的距離」為目標，讓彼此關係更緊密吧！

◆遊戲特色


◇20張基本CG，4組動態CG，包含差分180張以上
◇遊戲文字10萬字
◇一位主要女角
◇以為是奴隸調教但其實是（被迫）同居純愛養成遊戲
◇遊戲結局：5種（包含中途BE）

data.short_description: 百般不願意的答應了難以應對的前公司美女主管的寄宿請求，結果她卻擅自開始「扮演奴隸」作為報酬，不但口口聲聲叫喚我「主人」，還時不時就把我的衣服扒掉對我上下其手？！到底怎麼回事？！！ 但是和她相處得越久，我卻也漸漸得知她的另一面，以及越來越好奇她住在我家的真正原因，我的心中竟也因為她而起了一波波的漣漪……
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Rich Lady's Slave Role Play
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


With a sense of loss and frustration, I left the company at a very low point – because I thought I was useless there.
But then Liu Huixi, who had been my supervisor, appeared in front of me with a suitcase.



“There's something going on at my place and I can't get involved with the company. Can you take me in for a while...?”

She was one of the reasons I had left my job. I wanted to refuse her request but, due to the painful memories of how she had made things difficult for me, I couldn't say what I wanted. So, I agreed to let her stay at my house for a while.

But when I least expected it, she started to “play slave” as her payment, calling me “master” and occasionally stripping me of my clothes. She's even putting her hands on me! What the hell was going on!?!



But the more time I spent with her, the more I learned about a side of her that was different from her “supervisor” status. I didn't seem to be as afraid of her presence as I had been before. I even grew curious about her and wanted to understand the real reason she insisted on staying at my house...

As I recalled more and more memories, my heart even skipped a beat for her…

◆Gameplay Instructions


There are four daily sessions where players can choose from various rooms in the house to explore, take actions, and find and interact with Huixi.
The actions will open up as the plot develops and the number of interactions with Huixi will increase.
The status the protagonist accumulates through these actions will affect the final outcome, so aim to increase the ‘heart link’ between you and Huixi and make your relationship closer!

◆Game Features


◇21 basic CGs, including more than 500 differentials and 4 motion CGs
◇Game text: 130,000
◇One main female character
◇Seems to be slave training but actually a (forced) cohabitation simulation game of pure love
◇Game endings: 5 types (including a Bad Ending halfway through)

data.short_description: I reluctantly agreed to accommodate my difficult supervisor from the company I had previously worked for – but, in return, she started to “play slave” as her payment! She’s calling me “master” and occasionally stripping me of my clothes, even putting her hands on me! What the hell was going on!?!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
